input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixBatchInnerSigs.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fixBatchInnerSigs: This amendment fixes an issue where inner transactions of a Batch transaction would be flagged as having valid signatures. Since inner transactions aren't signed directly, they should never have valid signatures. Warning. This amendment was disabled in v3.1.1 due to a bug. It will be replaced by BatchV1_1 in a future release.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixBatchInnerSigs appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 3.1.0.
